did_you_know.text: American civil rights movement: Freedom Riders are arrested in Jackson, Mississippi, for "disturbing the peace" after disembarking from their bus.

did_you_know.title: Thurgood Marshall Nominated to Supreme Court
did_you_know.text: President Lyndon B. Johnson nominated Thurgood Marshall to the U.S. Supreme Court, making him the first African American Justice in the nation's history.
